info.title: BlueGamma API
info.description:
Integrate real-time forward curve and swap rate data directly into your spreadsheets, treasury software, or pricing portfolios. Our API is developer-friendly, offering fast and reliable data access. **Why BlueGamma?** - **Specialized Data**: Access forward curves and swap rates for multiple currencies and tenors to make timely, data-driven decisions. - **Easy Integration**: Designed for easy integration into existing systems. - **Expert Support**: Our experts are available to assist with your integration needs.
💡 **Looking for more?** [Visit our website](https://www.bluegamma.io) to explore use cases and solutions.
🔗 **Ready to get started?**
[Book a demo →](https://app.lemcal.com/@alivohra/website-demo?back=1)

tags.name: Swap Rates
tags.description: Live and historical swap rate calculations, available tenors, and swap curve construction

tags.name: Forward & Discount Curves
tags.description: Forward curves, discount curves, and single-point calculations

tags.name: FX
tags.description: FX spot and forward rates, and real-time market data

tags.name: Central Bank and Benchmark Rates
tags.description: Interest rate fixings, central bank rates, and benchmark rate data for financial calculations

tags.name: Government Bonds
tags.description: Government bond yields and treasury rate calculations

tags.name: Swaptions
tags.description: European swaption pricing with live yield curves and normal volatility surface. Pricing, delta, DV01, and vega for payer and receiver swaptions.

get.description: This endpoint calculates the swap rate based on the specified parameters.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific index (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR OR SONIA) on which the swap rate is based.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date for the swap. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '6M', '1Y'), but not both.

parameters.name: maturity_date
parameters.description:
The maturity date for the swap. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2030-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1Y', '5Y'), but not both.
**Validation Requirements:** - Maturity date must be in the future - Maturity date must be later than start date - If using a tenor, it represents the period from start date to maturity

parameters.name: fixed_leg_frequency
parameters.description: The payment frequency for the fixed leg of the swap. Common values are '1M', '3M', '6M', '1Y'.

parameters.name: floating_leg_frequency
parameters.description: The payment frequency for the floating leg of the swap. Common values are '1M', '3M', '6M', '1Y'. If not provided, the frequency defaults to match the fixed leg.

parameters.name: fixed_leg_day_count
parameters.description: The day count convention used for the fixed leg of the swap. By default, we use the currency-specific day count convention.

parameters.name: floating_leg_day_count
parameters.description: The day count convention used for the floating leg of the swap. By default, we use the currency-specific day count convention.

200.description: Successful retrieval of calculated swap rate data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description:
This endpoint returns a complete swap curve for a given index, calculating swap rates 
for all available tenors. It uses the predefined index configuration to automatically 
determine the appropriate day count conventions and frequencies, then fetches all 
available tenors from the database.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The name of the index for which to retrieve the swap curve.

200.description: Successful retrieval of complete swap curve data for all available tenors.

error.description: Error message if the calculation failed for this tenor

404.description: Not Found - No tenors available for the specified index or currency.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - The provided index name is not found in the configuration.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Fetches the forward rate based on the specified parameters, including reference rate, start date, end date and optional valuation time.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific rate the user wants to base the forecast on (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA, 3M NIBOR etc.).

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description:
The start date for the forward rate calculation. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1Y', '5Y'), but not both.
**Validation Requirements:** - Start date must be later than valuation time - If using a tenor, it represents the period from valuation time to start date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date for the forward period. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2026-03-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1M', '3M'), but not both.

200.description: Successful retrieval of forward curve data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Fetches the discount factor based on the specified parameters, including reference rate, date and optional valuation time.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific rate the user wants to base the forecast on (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA, 3M NIBOR etc.).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date for the discount factor calculation. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1Y', '5Y'), but not both.

200.description: Successful retrieval of discount rate data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Fetches the zero rate (spot rate) based on the specified parameters, including reference rate, date and optional valuation time. Returns the zero rate as a percentage with configurable compounding and day count conventions.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific rate the user wants to base the forecast on (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA, 3M NIBOR etc.).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date for the zero rate calculation. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1Y', '5Y'), but not both.

parameters.name: day_count
parameters.description: Day count convention for the zero rate calculation. If not provided, uses the curve's default day count.

parameters.name: compounding
parameters.description: Compounding type for the zero rate. Default is Simple.

parameters.name: compounding_frequency
parameters.description: Compounding frequency. Only applicable when compounding is set to 'Compounded'. Default is 12M (Annual).

200.description: Successful retrieval of zero rate data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Fetches the foreign exchange spot rate for the specified currency pair.

parameters.name: currency_pair
parameters.description: Currency pair for which to retrieve the FX spot rate (e.g., EURUSD, GBPJPY).

200.description: Successful retrieval of FX spot rate data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Fetches the forward exchange rate for a given currency pair. The forward rate is determined based on the specified date or defaults to the current date.

parameters.name: currency_pair
parameters.description: The currency pair in ISO format (e.g., "EURUSD" for Euro to US Dollar).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date for which the forward rate is requested. Defaults to the current date if not specified.

200.description: Successful retrieval of FX forward rate data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

parameters.name: s
parameters.description:
Select which currency symbols to include in your real-time data stream.
Repeat the `s` parameter to include multiple symbols (e.g., `?s=EURUSD&s=GBPUSD`).
Supports major pairs (EUR/USD, GBP/USD), crosses (EUR/GBP, AUD/JPY), and emerging market currencies.

**Supported symbols include:**
- **Major pairs**: EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY, USDCHF, AUDUSD, USDCAD, NZDUSD
- **Euro crosses**: EURGBP, EURJPY, EURCHF, EURAUD, EURCAD
- **Other crosses**: GBPJPY, CHFJPY, AUDJPY, CADJPY
- **Emerging markets**: USDMXN, USDBRL, USDZAR, USDTRY, USDCNY

Comma-separated values are not accepted.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: JWT token used to authenticate the WebSocket connection. Obtain your token from BlueGamma. This token must be provided as a query parameter when opening the WebSocket connection.

302.description: This endpoint provides documentation for the FX WebSocket streaming service. Connect directly using the WebSocket URL.

Location.description: WebSocket streaming endpoint URL with authentication token and selected symbols

403.description:
**Authentication Required**

Your API key is missing, invalid, or has insufficient permissions for real-time data access.
Please verify your API key and ensure your subscription includes streaming data access.

500.description:
**Service Temporarily Unavailable**

The streaming service is experiencing high demand or temporary maintenance.
Please retry your connection in a few moments.

get.description: Calculates the yield for a government bond yield based on country and tenor. Yields are zero coupon yields, assuming S/A compounding.

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: The ISO country code for which to retrieve the government bond yield (e.g., US, UK, DE).

parameters.name: maturity
parameters.description: The tenor or specific date for the government bond yield (e.g., '1Y', '5Y', '10Y' or '2030-12-31').

parameters.name: forward_start
parameters.description: The forward start date or tenor for the government bond yield (e.g., '1Y', '5Y', '10Y' or '2030-12-31').

200.description: Successful retrieval of government bond yield data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Returns a forward curve constructed over a schedule of periods between start_date and end_date.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific rate the user wants to base the forecast on (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA, 3M NIBOR etc.).

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description:
The start date for the forward curve calculation. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1Y', '5Y'), but not both.
**Validation Requirements:** - Start date must be later than valuation time - If using a tenor, it represents the period from valuation time to start date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date for the forward curve. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2050-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '10Y', '20Y'), but not both.

parameters.name: tenor
parameters.description:
The tenor (time period) for each forward rate in the curve (e.g., '1M', '3M', '6M'). This represents the length of each forward-looking period in the curve.
**Optional**: If not provided, a default tenor will be used based on the specified index.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: The frequency at which to generate curve points (e.g., '1M', '3M', '6M', '1Y').

parameters.name: is_end_of_month
parameters.description: Whether to align periods to the end of each month.

200.description: Successful retrieval of forward curve data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Returns discount factors for a schedule between start_date and end_date using a given index.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific rate the user wants to base the discount factors on (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA, 3M NIBOR etc.).

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date for the discount curve calculation. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '1Y', '5Y'), but not both.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date for the discount curve. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2030-12-31') or a tenor (e.g., '10Y', '50Y'), but not both.

parameters.name: is_end_of_month
parameters.description: Whether to align periods to the end of each month.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: The frequency at which to generate curve points (e.g., '1M', '3M', '6M', '1Y').

200.description: Successful retrieval of discount curve data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Fetches the fixing rate for a given index at a specific valuation time.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific rate or benchmark for which to retrieve a daily published value. This includes traditional fixings (e.g., SOFR, 3M EURIBOR), as well as central bank policy rates (e.g., Fed Funds Target Rate, ECB Main Refinancing Rate, BOE Bank Rate).

parameters.name: valuation_date
parameters.description: The specific date for the market data used in the calculation. If not provided, live data is used by default.

200.description: Successful retrieval of fixing rate data.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Returns historical swap rates for a given index and tenor over a date range (start_date to end_date).

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific index (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA) for the swap rates.

parameters.name: tenor
parameters.description: The tenor for each swap rate (e.g., '1Y', '5Y').

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date for the swap rates (inclusive). Provide a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31').

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date for the swap rates (inclusive). Provide a specific date (e.g., '2025-12-31').

200.description: Successful retrieval of historical swap rates.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

post.description:
Calculate the mark-to-market (MTM) value, fair rate, PV01, and detailed cashflows
for an interest rate swap. Supports amortizing swaps with variable notional amounts.

When fixed_rate is omitted, the swap is valued at the fair (par) rate and
mark-to-market is zero.

This endpoint provides comprehensive swap valuation including:
- Fair swap rate calculation
- Mark-to-market valuation
- PV01 (dollar value of a basis point)
- Detailed cashflow schedules for both fixed and floating legs

with_day_counts.summary: Swap with Custom Day Count Conventions

at_fair_rate.summary: Swap at fair rate (no fixed rate; MTM zero)

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description: Returns the list of available tenors for swap rates for a given index.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The specific index (e.g., SOFR, 1M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, SONIA) for which to retrieve available swap rate tenors.

200.description: Successful retrieval of available swap rate tenors.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.summary: Calculate Compounded Overnight Rate / Realised Rate
get.description:
Calculate compounded overnight rates (realised rates) for risk-free rate (RFR) indices over a specified period.

This endpoint computes the realised compounded rate using actual market fixings for overnight reference rates. 
The calculation follows market conventions for each index, including day count conventions, lookback periods, 
lockout days, and observation shifts.

**Supported Overnight Indices:**
- SOFR (Secured Overnight Financing Rate)
- SONIA (Sterling Overnight Index Average)
- ESTR (Euro Short-Term Rate)
- SORA (Singapore Overnight Rate Average)
- TONAR (Tokyo Overnight Average Rate)
- CORRA (Canadian Overnight Repo Rate Average)
- SARON (Swiss Average Rate Overnight)

**Use Cases:**
- Calculate historical realised rates for loan settlements
- Compute interest payments based on overnight index compounding
- Validate RFR-based calculations
- Generate audit trails for compounded rate calculations

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Period start date. Provide a specific date (e.g., '2024-01-01').

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description:
Period end date. Provide a specific date (e.g., '2024-01-31').
**Validation Requirements:** - End date must be later than start date

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Overnight index name. Supported indices include SOFR, SONIA, ESTR, SORA, TONAR, CORRA, SARON, CDI, and Fed Funds.

parameters.name: nominal
parameters.description: Notional amount for calculation. If not provided, defaults to 1,000,000.

parameters.name: spread
parameters.description: Additional spread in percentage (e.g. 5 = 5%). If not provided, defaults to 0.

parameters.name: day_counter
parameters.description: Day count convention for the calculation. If not provided, uses the index-specific default convention.

parameters.name: lookback_days
parameters.description: Number of days to lag the reference rate. If not provided, defaults to 0.

parameters.name: lockout_days
parameters.description: Number of days at the end of the period without rate resets. If not provided, defaults to 0.

parameters.name: apply_observation_shift
parameters.description: Whether to apply observation shift to the rate calculation. If not provided, defaults to false.

200.description: Successful calculation of compounded overnight rate.

start_date.description: Actual start date used in calculation

end_date.description: Actual end date used in calculation

calendar.description: Calendar used for business day adjustments

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Invalid parameters provided (e.g., end date before start date, unsupported index).

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description:
Retrieves Forward Rate Agreement (FRA) rates for a given index.
Returns all available tenors and their corresponding rates.
Supported indices are denominated in EUR, SEK, NOK, and DKK.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The index name for which to retrieve FRA rates (e.g., 3M EURIBOR, 3M STIBOR, 3M NIBOR, 3M CIBOR).

currency.description: The currency derived from the index

404.description: No FRA rates found for the given index and valuation time.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - FRA rates not available for the given index.

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

get.description:
Price a European swaption (payer or receiver) with live yield curves and
normal volatility surface.

Returns NPV, delta, DV01, and vega. The exercise date equals the swap start date
(mid-curve swaptions are not supported).

**Supported indices:** SOFR, SONIA, 3M EURIBOR, 6M EURIBOR, 1M EURIBOR, SARON, AONIA,
3M CDOR, NOWA, SWESTR, STINA, DESTR, CITA, 3M JIBAR, ZARONIA, 3M HIBOR, HONIA,
3M KLIBOR, OCR, NZONIA.

**Example request:**
```
GET /swaption_price?index=SOFR&start_date=2Y&maturity_date=5Y&swaption_type=payer
```

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The reference rate index (e.g., SOFR, SONIA, 3M EURIBOR). Must be a supported post-LIBOR transition index.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date for the underlying swap (= exercise date). Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2028-02-21') or a tenor (e.g., '2Y').

parameters.name: maturity_date
parameters.description: The maturity date for the underlying swap. Provide either a specific date (e.g., '2033-02-21') or a tenor (e.g., '5Y'). If using a tenor, it represents the period from start date to maturity.

parameters.name: strike_rate
parameters.description: Strike rate as a percentage (e.g., 3.5 for 3.5%). If omitted, the swaption is priced at ATM (forward swap rate).

parameters.name: notional
parameters.description: Notional amount. Defaults to 10,000,000.

parameters.name: swaption_type
parameters.description: Swaption type. Defaults to 'payer'.

parameters.name: valuation_time
parameters.description: Valuation time in ISO 8601 format. Defaults to current time.

forward_rate.description: ATM forward swap rate as a percentage

normal_volatility_bps.description: Normal (Bachelier) volatility in basis points (e.g., 60.7 for 60.7 bps). Sourced directly from Xignite.

npv.description: Net present value in currency units

delta.description: Bachelier delta: Φ(d) for payer (0 to 1), Φ(d)−1 for receiver (−1 to 0). ATM = 0.5 for payer.

dv01.description: Rate sensitivity: delta × PVBP (pricing currency units per bp). Comparable to PV01 on the swap endpoint.

vega.description: NPV sensitivity to a 1bp shift in normal volatility (pricing currency units per bp)

timestamp.description: Most recent market data timestamp (max of curve and vol surface data timestamps).

500.description: Internal Server Error - An error occurred while processing the request.

valuation_time.name: valuation_time
valuation_time.description: The specific time (or date) for the market data used in the calculation. If valuation_time is not provided, the endpoint will use the most recent market data available. For major currencies (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP), data is updated every minute. This timestamp should be in ISO 8601 format and is interpreted as UTC.

Date.description: A date in ISO 8601 only date format (YYYY-MM-DD)

LaterDate.description: A date in ISO 8601 only date format (YYYY-MM-DD)

DateTime.description: A date and time in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ). All times are interpreted as UTC.

Tenor.description: A time period represented as a number followed by a period indicator (D=days, W=weeks, M=months, Y=years)

Index.description: Common interest rate benchmarks and indices used in financial markets

FixingIndex.description: Interest rate benchmarks and indices available for fixing rate retrieval (excludes SAIBOR)
enum: BOC Target for the Overnight Rate

FRAIndex.description: Indices supported for FRA rate retrieval. These are IBOR-type indices denominated in EUR, SEK, NOK, and DKK.

DayCountConvention.description: Day count convention for interest rate and swap calculations

index.description: The reference rate index (e.g., SOFR, 3M EURIBOR, SONIA)

allOf.description: The day count convention used for the fixed leg. By default, uses the currency-specific convention

fixed_rate.description: The fixed rate as a percentage (e.g., 4.25 for 4.25%). Optional; when omitted, the swap is valued at the fair rate and mark-to-market is zero.

fixed_leg_first_payment_date.description: The first payment date (e.g., '2026-08-02'). If not provided, defaults to start_date + fixed_leg_frequency adjusted for business days.

fixed_notionals.description: Notional amount(s). Provide a single number for vanilla swaps or a list for amortizing swaps.

valuation_time.description: Valuation time in ISO 8601 format. Defaults to current time if not provided.

currency.description: Currency of the swap derived from the index

start_date.description: The effective start date of the swap

maturity_date.description: The maturity date of the swap

fixed_leg_first_payment_date.description: First payment date for the fixed leg

floating_leg_first_payment_date.description: First payment date for the floating leg

valuation_time.description: The valuation time used for pricing

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the market data used

fixed_leg_frequency.description: Payment frequency of the fixed leg

floating_leg_frequency.description: Payment frequency of the floating leg

allOf.description: Day count convention for the fixed leg
Day count convention for the floating leg

fixed_rate.description: The fixed rate of the swap as a percentage (input parameter). Null when not supplied in the request (swap valued at fair rate, MTM zero).

fair_rate.description: The fair (par) swap rate as a percentage

mtm.description: Mark-to-market value of the swap (positive = asset, negative = liability)

pv01.description: Dollar value of a 1 basis point move in rates (PV01)

fixed_cashflows.description: Detailed cashflows for the fixed leg

floating_cashflows.description: Detailed cashflows for the floating leg

CashflowDetail.description: Detailed information for a single cashflow period

period_start.description: Start date of the accrual period

period_end.description: End date of the accrual period

day_count_fraction.description: Year fraction based on day count convention

rate.description: Interest rate for this period (fixed rate for fixed leg, forward rate for floating leg)

BadRequest.description: Bad Request – check `error.response.data.detail` which contains a descriptive error message or a list of parameter validation errors.

UnprocessableEntity.description: Unprocessable Entity - The request was well-formed but contains semantic errors.

value.detail: Invalid index provided. Supported indices: SOFR, 3M EURIBOR, SONIA, etc.
Invalid tenor format. Must match pattern: [0-9]+[DWMY] (e.g., 1Y, 3M, 2W, 5D)
Start date must be earlier than end date
Date must be in the future
Start date must be later than valuation time
Maturity date must be in the future
Maturity date must be later than start date
Invalid date format. Must be YYYY-MM-DD or a tenor string matching pattern: [0-9]+[DWMY] (e.g., 1Y, 3M, 2W, 5D)

NotFound.description: Not Found - The requested resource or data could not be found.

value.detail: No data available for the specified date range
No tenors available for the specified index
Fixing not found for the specified date
No curve data available for the specified parameters
